title: Polypodiodes manmeiensis
taxonomy: Polypodiodes manmeiensis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Polypodiodes, which is a group of small to medium-sized ferns. The genus Polypodiodes is part of the family Polypodiaceae, a family of ferns that includes over 2,000 species. The family Polypodiaceae is within the order Polypodiales, which is a large and diverse group of ferns. The order Polypodiales is part of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes all the ferns.
